title: add gpu prognostic edmf aquaplanet

body:
This PR improves restarted simulations:

Content
- Move the restart file from `ENV["RESTART_FILE"]` to `parsed_args["restart_file"]`. This will make it simpler to set the restart file for calibration experiments.
- Enable progress logging in restarted simulations. The progress callback now takes the start time into account instead of assuming that a sim starts from 0.0
title: Add `restart_file` configuration variable, remove ENV variable, enable restarted progress logging

body:
The CPU scaling pipeline has broken with the move to the new partition. 
This PR moves to the new partition, runs only on icelake nodes and has core counts set properly for icelake. 

CPU Scaling efficiency is affected dramatically, going from ~70% on 128 cores to ~90 on 112 cores!

Passing scaling [build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-scaling/builds/577)
title: Update scaling pipeline, remove stray line from CI pipeline.yml
